Epic Universe · Universal Orlando

When you book JMEDIA, you're booking Jordan Roberson — not an agency, not a middleman.

Jordan is the one on set, behind the camera, and on your crew list. With 15+ years of production experience spanning live broadcast, commercial sets, studio productions, and branded content — he brings technical depth and on-set composure to every job.

He's worked alongside production companies like Cutters Studios, Biscuit Filmworks, and Durable Goods, and serves as an active crew member for Universal Orlando's in-house production operations.

What We Offer
JMEDIA Services
01
Commercial Production
From single-day shoots to multi-day commercial campaigns — camera operation, crew coordination, and production management across Florida and beyond.
02
Branded Content
Cinematic storytelling for brands, agencies, and marketing teams. Concept through delivery — pre-production, on-set execution, and post.
03
Crew Hire
Book Jordan directly as a crew member — PA, Camera Utility, 1st AC, or Camera Operator — for any production across Florida and beyond.
04
Event & Corporate
Multi-camera event coverage, corporate shoots, headshot days, and live-to-record productions for brands of any size.
05
Live Production
Multi-camera live direction and switching for broadcast, church, and event productions. 15+ years of live floor experience.
06
Post Production
Editing, color grading, and final delivery in Final Cut Pro and Adobe Premiere. Full pipeline from shoot day to finished deliverable.
Meet The
Robersons
@meet_therobersons

Jordan and Ashly Roberson produce family lifestyle and theme park content across YouTube and Instagram — with a focus on Universal Orlando. As paid talent partners with Universal Orlando, the Robersons bring production-quality storytelling to family content.
